result.summary: Found 1 developer integration surface for archbee.com: an authenticated HTTP Public API at https://api.archbee.com/api/public-api, documented via the Sync Open Api document page; no evidence of CLI, MCP, or separate GraphQL API endpoints for external integration.

archbee_docspace_api_key.label: Doc Space ID + API key used to build Archbee bearer token
archbee_docspace_api_key.setup: In Archbee, obtain your Doc Space identifier and API key from the product's API/public API settings or the API docs workflow for your workspace, then build the token required by the Public API as `base64(docSpaceId~apiKey)`. The docs for the sync endpoint explicitly say to send `Authorization: Bearer {base64(docSpaceId~apiKey)}` on requests to the Public API. Start from the Archbee docs page [Sync Open Api document](https://www.archbee.com/docs/sync-open-api-document).

requiredHeaders.name: Content-Type
requiredHeaders.description: Required by the documented sync endpoint example.
